surface.name: Hosted Supabase project + cURL Data API leaderboard
surface.selection_basis: API quickstart builds a public leaderboard table and documents cURL GET to https://<PROJECT_REF>.supabase.co/rest/v1/leaderboard with apikey header. Prefer hosted project + cURL over framework quickstarts.

alternatives_considered.name: React framework quickstart
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Local app scaffold; API quickstart reaches first success with cURL only.

alternatives_considered.name: Local CLI + Docker
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Local stack; policy prefers hosted project.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a hosted Supabase project, expose a leaderboard table via Data API, and query it with cURL.
assumed_prior_state: A terminal with cURL is available.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: cURL GET /rest/v1/leaderboard returns JSON rows ordered by score.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: Successful JSON array including inserted players (alice/bob/carol/dave) or equivalent rows.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: API quickstart ends Fetch the data with a cURL example using PROJECT_REF and publishable key.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: Named first API success is the cURL read of leaderboard data.

prerequisites.requirement: Publishable/anon API key from project API settings.

primary_path.action: Create a Supabase account and a new project; wait until the project is ready.
primary_path.success_signal: Table Editor and API settings available.

primary_path.action: Create public.leaderboard (SQL or Table Editor) with player and score columns.
Expose the table to the Data API / anon role and configure RLS select policy for public reads as documented.
primary_path.success_signal: Anon can select per quickstart grants/policies.

friction_gates.description: Publishable API key required on requests.

time_to_first_success.value: less than 2 minutes (API route after project exists)

sources.title: Build an API route in less than 2 minutes
